short_summary: Xi in Pyongyang, El Niño ongoing
rationale: Xi's confirmed Pyongyang visit deepens the authoritarian axis threatening Romania's regional security via the Russia-Ukraine war; El Niño continues as a background commodity risk, both are continuations without new escalation.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Deepening China-North Korea axis strengthens Russia's strategic partners, indirectly worsening Romania's security environment given the ongoing war on its northern border.

top_events.title: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low: World Bank
top_events.summary: Persistent World Bank warning on economic fallout from US-Iran conflict; energy price risk relevant to Romania's cost of living.

top_events.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: El Niño confirmed; weather extremes and commodity price pressures remain a background risk for Romania.
